steps.title: Set up
steps.content: Right angle at $S$, so $TR = 84$ is the hypotenuse and $RS = \sqrt{167}$. Find leg $TS$ via the Pythagorean theorem: $$TS^2 = 84^2 - 167 = 7056 - 167 = 6889$$ $$TS = 83$$

steps.title: Solve
steps.content: $\sin R$ uses the side opposite $R$ (which is $TS$) over the hypotenuse: $$\sin R = \frac{TS}{TR} = \frac{83}{84} \approx 0.9881$$
